--sf-animation-blink.value: sf-blink calc(1s * var(--sf-motion-scale)) steps(1, end) infinite

--sf-color-action.value: light-dark(var(--sf-color-action-light), var(--sf-color-action-dark, oklch(from var(--sf-color-action-light) clamp(0.65, calc(0.95 - l * 0.5), 0.88) calc(c * 0.9) h)))

--sf-color-base.value: light-dark(var(--sf-color-base-light), var(--sf-color-base-dark, oklch(from var(--sf-color-base-light) clamp(0.16, calc(1.18 - l), 0.24) calc(c * 0.5) h)))

--sf-color-border.value: light-dark( oklch(from var(--sf-color-neutral-light) clamp(0.70, calc(l + 0.35), 0.95) 0.005 h), oklch(from var(--sf-color-neutral) clamp(0.25, calc(l - 0.3), 0.55) 0.005 h) )

--sf-color-border--strong.value: light-dark( oklch(from var(--sf-color-neutral-light) clamp(0.55, calc(l + 0.1), 0.85) 0.02 h), oklch(from var(--sf-color-neutral) clamp(0.38, calc(l - 0.1), 0.65) 0.02 h) )

--sf-color-border--subtle.value: light-dark( oklch(from var(--sf-color-neutral-light) clamp(0.75, calc(l + 0.4), 0.97) 0.005 h), oklch(from var(--sf-color-neutral) clamp(0.20, calc(l - 0.38), 0.45) 0.005 h) )

--sf-color-danger.value: light-dark(var(--sf-color-danger-light), var(--sf-color-danger-dark, oklch(from var(--sf-color-danger-light) clamp(0.65, calc(0.95 - l * 0.5), 0.88) calc(c * 0.9) h)))

--sf-color-danger-strong.value: light-dark( oklch(from var(--sf-color-danger-light) calc(l - 0.1) c h), oklch(from var(--sf-color-danger) clamp(0.70, calc(l + 0.15), 1) c h) )

--sf-color-error.value: light-dark(var(--sf-color-error-light), var(--sf-color-error-dark, oklch(from var(--sf-color-error-light) clamp(0.65, calc(0.95 - l * 0.5), 0.88) calc(c * 0.9) h)))

--sf-color-error-strong.value: light-dark( oklch(from var(--sf-color-error-light) calc(l - 0.1) c h), oklch(from var(--sf-color-error) clamp(0.70, calc(l + 0.15), 1) c h) )

--sf-color-heading.value: light-dark( oklch(from var(--sf-color-neutral-light) clamp(0.05, calc(l - 0.4 - var(--sf-contrast-bias)), 0.35) c h), oklch(from var(--sf-color-neutral) clamp(0.70, calc(l + 0.25 + var(--sf-contrast-bias)), 1) c h) )

--sf-color-info.value: light-dark(var(--sf-color-info-light), var(--sf-color-info-dark, oklch(from var(--sf-color-info-light) clamp(0.65, calc(0.95 - l * 0.5), 0.88) calc(c * 0.9) h)))

--sf-color-info-strong.value: light-dark( oklch(from var(--sf-color-info-light) calc(l - 0.1) c h), oklch(from var(--sf-color-info) clamp(0.70, calc(l + 0.15), 1) c h) )

--sf-color-inverse.value: oklch(from var(--sf-color-base) calc(1 - l) c h)

--sf-color-link.value: light-dark( oklch(from var(--sf-color-action) clamp(0, min(l - 0.07, 0.48), 1) c h), oklch(from var(--sf-color-action) clamp(0.68, l, 1) c h) )

--sf-color-link--active.value: light-dark( oklch(from var(--sf-color-action) clamp(0, min(l - 0.21, 0.34), 1) c h), oklch(from var(--sf-color-action) clamp(0, max(l + 0.15, 0.74), 1) c h) )

--sf-color-link--hover.value: light-dark( oklch(from var(--sf-color-action) clamp(0, min(l - 0.15, 0.40), 1) c h), oklch(from var(--sf-color-action) clamp(0, max(l + 0.10, 0.68), 1) c h) )

--sf-color-link--visited.value: light-dark( oklch(from var(--sf-color-action) clamp(0, min(l - 0.07, 0.48), 1) c calc(h + 60)), oklch(from var(--sf-color-action) clamp(0.68, l, 1) c calc(h + 60)) )

--sf-color-neutral.value: light-dark(var(--sf-color-neutral-light), var(--sf-color-neutral-dark, oklch(from var(--sf-color-neutral-light) clamp(0.65, calc(0.95 - l * 0.5), 0.88) calc(c * 0.9) h)))

--sf-color-primary.value: light-dark(var(--sf-color-primary-light), var(--sf-color-primary-dark, oklch(from var(--sf-color-primary-light) clamp(0.65, calc(0.95 - l * 0.5), 0.88) calc(c * 0.9) h)))

--sf-color-secondary.value: light-dark(var(--sf-color-secondary-light), var(--sf-color-secondary-dark, oklch(from var(--sf-color-secondary-light) clamp(0.65, calc(0.95 - l * 0.5), 0.88) calc(c * 0.9) h)))

--sf-color-selection-bg.value: light-dark( oklch(from var(--sf-color-action-light) l c h / 0.28), oklch(from var(--sf-color-action-light) clamp(0.62, calc(0.93 - l * 0.4), 0.78) c h / 0.55) )

--sf-color-success.value: light-dark(var(--sf-color-success-light), var(--sf-color-success-dark, oklch(from var(--sf-color-success-light) clamp(0.65, calc(0.95 - l * 0.5), 0.88) calc(c * 0.9) h)))

--sf-color-success-strong.value: light-dark( oklch(from var(--sf-color-success-light) calc(l - 0.15) c h), oklch(from var(--sf-color-success) clamp(0.70, calc(l + 0.15), 1) c h) )

--sf-color-tertiary.value: light-dark(var(--sf-color-tertiary-light), var(--sf-color-tertiary-dark, oklch(from var(--sf-color-tertiary-light) clamp(0.65, calc(0.95 - l * 0.5), 0.88) calc(c * 0.9) h)))

--sf-color-text.value: light-dark( oklch(from var(--sf-color-neutral-light) clamp(0.05, calc(l - 0.4 - var(--sf-contrast-bias)), 0.35) c h), oklch(from var(--sf-color-neutral) clamp(0.70, calc(l + 0.25 + var(--sf-contrast-bias)), 1) c h) )

--sf-color-text--disabled.value: light-dark( oklch(from var(--sf-color-neutral-light) clamp(0.55, calc(l + 0.25), 0.82) c h), oklch(from var(--sf-color-neutral) clamp(0.25, calc(l - 0.2), 0.55) c h) )

--sf-color-text--inverse.value: light-dark( oklch(from var(--sf-color-neutral-light) clamp(0.85, calc(l + 0.4), 0.98) c h), oklch(from var(--sf-color-neutral) clamp(0.05, calc(l - 0.4), 0.35) c h) )

--sf-color-text--placeholder.value: light-dark( oklch(from var(--sf-color-neutral-light) clamp(0.45, calc(l + 0.15), 0.75) c h), oklch(from var(--sf-color-neutral) clamp(0.35, calc(l - 0.1), 0.65) c h) )

--sf-color-text--secondary.value: light-dark( oklch(from var(--sf-color-neutral-light) clamp(0.15, calc(l - 0.25 - var(--sf-contrast-bias)), 0.45) c h), oklch(from var(--sf-color-neutral) clamp(0.55, calc(l + 0.1 + var(--sf-contrast-bias)), 0.90) c h) )

--sf-color-warning.value: light-dark(var(--sf-color-warning-light), var(--sf-color-warning-dark, oklch(from var(--sf-color-warning-light) clamp(0.65, calc(0.95 - l * 0.5), 0.88) calc(c * 0.9) h)))

--sf-color-warning-strong.value: light-dark( oklch(from var(--sf-color-warning-light) calc(l - 0.25) c h), oklch(from var(--sf-color-warning) clamp(0.70, calc(l + 0.05), 1) c h) )

--sf-drop-shadow-l.value: drop-shadow(0 8px 16px oklch(from var(--sf-shadow-color) l c h / clamp(0, calc(var(--sf-shadow-strength) * 2.5), 0.7)))

--sf-drop-shadow-m.value: drop-shadow(0 4px 6px oklch(from var(--sf-shadow-color) l c h / clamp(0, calc(var(--sf-shadow-strength) * 2), 0.7)))

--sf-drop-shadow-s.value: drop-shadow(0 1px 2px oklch(from var(--sf-shadow-color) l c h / clamp(0, calc(var(--sf-shadow-strength) * 1.5), 0.7)))

--sf-gradient-brand.value: linear-gradient(in oklch 135deg, var(--sf-color-primary), oklch(from var(--sf-color-primary) l c calc(h + 30)))

--sf-gradient-fade--b.value: linear-gradient(in oklch to bottom, transparent, var(--sf-color-bg))

--sf-gradient-fade--l.value: linear-gradient(in oklch to left, transparent, var(--sf-color-bg))

--sf-gradient-fade--r.value: linear-gradient(in oklch to right, transparent, var(--sf-color-bg))

--sf-gradient-fade--t.value: linear-gradient(in oklch to top, transparent, var(--sf-color-bg))

--sf-gradient-primary.value: linear-gradient(in oklch 135deg, var(--sf-color-primary), oklch(from var(--sf-color-primary) calc(l - 0.08) c h))

--sf-gradient-secondary.value: linear-gradient(in oklch 135deg, var(--sf-color-secondary), oklch(from var(--sf-color-secondary) calc(l - 0.08) c h))

--sf-gradient-tertiary.value: linear-gradient(in oklch 135deg, var(--sf-color-tertiary), oklch(from var(--sf-color-tertiary) calc(l - 0.08) c h))

--sf-shadow-2xl.value: 0 4px 12px 0 oklch(from var(--sf-shadow-color) l c h / clamp(0, calc(var(--sf-shadow-strength) * 0.6), 0.7)), 0 20px 60px 0 oklch(from var(--sf-shadow-color) l c h / clamp(0, calc(var(--sf-shadow-strength) * 4), 0.7)), 0 40px 100px -8px oklch(from var(--sf-shadow-color) l c h / clamp(0, calc(var(--sf-shadow-strength) * 5), 0.7))

--sf-shadow-glow.value: 0 0 15px 2px oklch(from var(--sf-shadow-glow-color) l c h / clamp(0, calc(var(--sf-shadow-strength) * 2), 0.7))

--sf-shadow-inner.value: inset 0 2px 4px 0 oklch(from var(--sf-shadow-color) l c h / clamp(0, calc(var(--sf-shadow-strength) * 2), 0.7))

--sf-shadow-l.value: 0 2px 4px 0 oklch(from var(--sf-shadow-color) l c h / clamp(0, calc(var(--sf-shadow-strength) * 0.5), 0.7)), 0 8px 24px 0 oklch(from var(--sf-shadow-color) l c h / clamp(0, calc(var(--sf-shadow-strength) * 3), 0.7)), 0 16px 48px 0 oklch(from var(--sf-shadow-color) l c h / clamp(0, calc(var(--sf-shadow-strength) * 2), 0.7))

--sf-shadow-m.value: 0 1px 3px 0 oklch(from var(--sf-shadow-color) l c h / clamp(0, calc(var(--sf-shadow-strength) * 0.5), 0.7)), 0 4px 12px 0 oklch(from var(--sf-shadow-color) l c h / clamp(0, calc(var(--sf-shadow-strength) * 2), 0.7))

--sf-shadow-s.value: 0 1px 2px 0 oklch(from var(--sf-shadow-color) l c h / clamp(0, calc(var(--sf-shadow-strength) * 0.5), 0.7)), 0 2px 6px 0 oklch(from var(--sf-shadow-color) l c h / clamp(0, var(--sf-shadow-strength), 0.7))

--sf-shadow-xl.value: 0 2px 8px 0 oklch(from var(--sf-shadow-color) l c h / clamp(0, calc(var(--sf-shadow-strength) * 0.5), 0.7)), 0 12px 36px 0 oklch(from var(--sf-shadow-color) l c h / clamp(0, calc(var(--sf-shadow-strength) * 3.5), 0.7)), 0 24px 72px 0 oklch(from var(--sf-shadow-color) l c h / clamp(0, calc(var(--sf-shadow-strength) * 2.5), 0.7))

--sf-shadow-xs.value: 0 1px 2px 0 oklch(from var(--sf-shadow-color) l c h / clamp(0, calc(var(--sf-shadow-strength) * 0.5), 0.7))

--sf-text-shadow-l.value: 0 4px 8px oklch(from var(--sf-shadow-color) l c h / clamp(0, calc(var(--sf-shadow-strength) * 2.5), 0.7))

--sf-text-shadow-m.value: 0 2px 4px oklch(from var(--sf-shadow-color) l c h / clamp(0, calc(var(--sf-shadow-strength) * 2), 0.7))

--sf-text-shadow-s.value: 0 1px 2px oklch(from var(--sf-shadow-color) l c h / clamp(0, calc(var(--sf-shadow-strength) * 1.5), 0.7))

--sf-transition-colors.value: color var(--sf-duration-normal) var(--sf-ease-out), background-color var(--sf-duration-normal) var(--sf-ease-out), border-color var(--sf-duration-normal) var(--sf-ease-out), text-decoration-color var(--sf-duration-normal) var(--sf-ease-out), fill var(--sf-duration-normal) var(--sf-ease-out), stroke var(--sf-duration-normal) var(--sf-ease-out)

--sf-transition-enter.value: color var(--sf-duration-normal) var(--sf-ease-out), background-color var(--sf-duration-normal) var(--sf-ease-out), border-color var(--sf-duration-normal) var(--sf-ease-out), box-shadow var(--sf-duration-normal) var(--sf-ease-out), opacity var(--sf-duration-normal) var(--sf-ease-out), transform var(--sf-duration-normal) var(--sf-ease-out), filter var(--sf-duration-normal) var(--sf-ease-out)

--sf-transition-fast.value: color var(--sf-duration-fast) var(--sf-ease-out), background-color var(--sf-duration-fast) var(--sf-ease-out), border-color var(--sf-duration-fast) var(--sf-ease-out), box-shadow var(--sf-duration-fast) var(--sf-ease-out), opacity var(--sf-duration-fast) var(--sf-ease-out), transform var(--sf-duration-fast) var(--sf-ease-out), filter var(--sf-duration-fast) var(--sf-ease-out)

--sf-transition-overlay.value: overlay var(--sf-duration-normal) allow-discrete, display var(--sf-duration-normal) allow-discrete

--sf-transition-slow.value: color var(--sf-duration-slow) var(--sf-ease-in-out), background-color var(--sf-duration-slow) var(--sf-ease-in-out), border-color var(--sf-duration-slow) var(--sf-ease-in-out), box-shadow var(--sf-duration-slow) var(--sf-ease-in-out), opacity var(--sf-duration-slow) var(--sf-ease-in-out), transform var(--sf-duration-slow) var(--sf-ease-in-out), filter var(--sf-duration-slow) var(--sf-ease-in-out)
